page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.3xlarge is a storage-focused virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores of an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. A key hardware characteristic is its massive bundled local storage, consisting of 35,433 GB of HDD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a 4 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark results indicate average multi-core performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 8789.97 and a PassMark CPU score of 10074.03. However, single-core performance is weak, as shown by a stress-ng single-core score of 1102.49 and a poor gzip single-threaded compression rate of 18.96 GB/sec. Memory performance is mixed; while cached small-block read bandwidth is average at 488.85 GB/sec, the PassMark memory score falls into the bottom 25%. Redis SET operations perform at an average rate of 8.27 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput is weak at 5.49 GB/sec.

Given the massive 35.4 TB HDD storage capacity bundled with moderate compute resources, this instance offers high resource density for storage-heavy applications. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for scenarios requiring large-scale data retention where SSD-level IOPS are not required. The hardware profile is suited for big data analytics, distributed file systems, log archiving, data warehousing, and cold storage databases.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.3xlarge is a storage-focused instance featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 48.0 GB of RAM. Its defining feature is the inclusion of 35,433 GB of local HDD storage, supported by a 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks show average multi-core capabilities, with a PassMark CPU score of 10074.03 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 37.67 GB/sec, though single-core performance remains weak. The instance is qualitatively cost-effective for high-capacity storage needs where sequential throughput is prioritized over high IOPS. It is best suited for big data processing, log archiving, and large-scale data warehousing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.3xlarge is a storage-focused instance with 12 Intel Xeon cores, 48 GB RAM, and 35,433 GB of local HDD storage, designed for high-capacity data processing and archiving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.3xlarge features 12 Intel Xeon cores, 48 GB RAM, and 35.4 TB of local HDD storage for large-scale data warehousing.
tagline: A storage-dense instance featuring twelve dedicated cores and over thirty-five terabytes of local HDD capacity for large-scale data archiving.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
48.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
35,433 GB of bundled local HDD storage capacity
Suited for big data analytics, log archiving, and cold storage
